title: Missing tags in HTTP response from HTTP node
symptom: When using the HTTP node in n8n, the response does not include certain tags that are present in Postman, leading to incomplete data.
applies_when: Receiving a response with tags like @ or :
not_this_if: Tags are present in the response when using Postman
root_cause: The HTTP node may not be interpreting the response correctly due to missing headers or incorrect response format settings. Specifically, the absence of the 'Accept: application/ld+json' header can lead to incomplete data retrieval.
fix_steps: Add the header 'Accept: application/ld+json' in the HTTP node settings
Set the response format to JSON in the HTTP Request node
agent_instruction: Add the required header and set the response format to JSON in the HTTP node.
